summary: Iteration 2 regression complete. Backend healthy (6/6 pytest passed). Frontend: dark default confirmed, hero kinetic name + rotating role (verified 4 role changes across 4 intervals cycling all HERO_ROLES) + availability pill + both CTAs functional. Theme toggle switches data-theme dark↔light, persists via localStorage 'ac-theme' across reloads, and reset to dark works. Nav backdrop-blur activates only after scroll > 24px. Contact form submits successfully in both dark AND light modes (success toast: 'Message sent. I'll reply within 24h.'). Mobile 390x844 renders with no horizontal overflow and theme toggle accessible + functional. No regressions detected.
passed: POST /api/contact valid → 200 status=success, returns id + email_sent flag
GET /api/contact returns list including recently submitted messages
Default document.documentElement data-theme='dark' on fresh load (localStorage cleared)
hero-name renders 'Alex Chen.' (with nbsp between words — intentional, per PROFILE.name split)
hero-role-rotator cycles Senior Software Engineer → Distributed Systems Architect → Cloud Infrastructure Builder → Full-Stack Craftsman → back to Senior (state-driven, 2.6s interval)
hero-availability pill visible with location text
hero-cta-work, hero-cta-contact, nav-cta, theme-toggle all present + clickable
Theme toggle: dark bodyBg=rgb(10,10,10) → light bodyBg=rgb(189,188,184); data-theme + localStorage updated
Theme persistence across reload: light→light, dark→dark ✓
Nav backdrop-blur absent at scrollY=0, present at scrollY>24 ✓
Contact form submit in DARK theme: success toast shown
Contact form submit in LIGHT theme: success toast shown
Mobile 390x844: no horizontal overflow (scrollWidth == innerWidth == 390); theme toggle visible + toggles to light correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Portfolio.jsx has grown to ~1060 lines and encapsulates ~10 components + hooks + constants. Consider splitting Hero, Nav, Contact into separate files under /components/portfolio/ and moving constants (PROFILE, HERO_ROLES, PROJECTS, SKILLS, EXPERIENCE) to /constants for maintainability. Not a bug — code quality only.

Note: Light-mode body bg computed as rgb(189,188,184) (a warm mid-gray) — visually lighter than dark and text remains readable, but slightly darker than the target '#F6F5F0' mentioned in the request. If the intent is a near-white paper look, review --bg / .bg-[#0A0A0A] override in [data-theme='light']. Not blocking.

Nav bg override at scroll uses 'bg-[#0A0A0A]/80' — the light-theme CSS override remaps this class, so the scrolled nav will be light-tinted in light mode too. That is consistent behavior; just confirm this is intended for light mode.
seed_data_creation: Contact messages inserted during tests: TEST_Iteration2, TEST_ListCheck, TEST_UIDark, TEST_UILight (via /api/contact — persisted in MongoDB contact_messages collection).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reusable pytest file: /app/backend/tests/test_portfolio_api.py (6 tests covering /api/, /api/contact POST + validation, /api/contact GET). Theme is stored in localStorage['ac-theme'] and applied to document.documentElement data-theme. Rotating role cycles HERO_ROLES[0..3] every 2600ms via setInterval — verify by sampling text at ≥3s intervals. Hero name uses U+00A0 non-breaking space between 'Alex' and 'Chen' — normalize before asserting text.
